title: Green's Better MC
description: A Modpack that will improve your world and experience and add tonnes of new biomes, features, mobs and optimization.
body:
An awesome modpack **This Modpack adds new: 1.Life Features 2.Mobs 3.Armours 4.Weapons 5.Enchantments 6.Dimentions 7.Biomes 8.Structures 9.Bosses 10.Mob Vote losers** More features are on the way and we are still working on for making it better. # **🌿 Green’s Better MC — The Ultimate Minecraft Overhaul** - Version: Fabric 1.21.1 Style: - Immersive, adventurous, and visually stunning - Playstyle: Solo & SMP-friendly - Status: First release — more updates coming! 🧠 What Is Green’s Better MC? Green’s Better MC is a feature-packed modpack that transforms vanilla Minecraft into a vibrant, living world full of new biomes, mobs, structures, enchantments, and tech. Whether you're exploring ancient ruins, flying custom aircraft, or battling through 3D trial chambers, this modpack delivers depth, beauty, and chaos in equal measure. ## 🔥 Key Features 🏛️ Better Archeology & Dungeons and Taverns — uncover secrets and loot in ancient structures ✈️ Immersive Aircraft & Aviator Dreams — take to the skies with custom flying machines 🌍 Biomes O’ Plenty, BetterNether, BetterEnd, Incendium — explore breathtaking new dimensions 🧙 More Enchants, Merge Enchantments, More Totems of Undying — power up your gear like never before 🐺 Better Wolf Companion, Nice Mobs Remastered, Untitled Duck Mod, Fowl Play — adorable chaos 🧱 Minecraft Movie Structures, Katters Structures, Luki’s Crazy Chambers — cinematic worldgen 🧪 GlitchCore, Thermoo, Immersive Machinery — tech meets magic 🎨 Fresh Animations, Complementary Shaders, Recolourful GUI, Cubic Sun & Moon — Generational Visual Overhaul 🧩 Teleport Commands, SmartBrainLib, Resourceful Config, Mod Menu — full control, smooth experience 🎥 Showcase Videos Check out our YouTube Shorts and long-form videos to see the modpack in action: 🔗 Short: (Coming Soon) 🔗 Full Tour: Green’s Better MC Features (Coming Soon) More videos coming soon — subscribe to stay updated! (Ofcourse when i post the video) 📦 What’s Inside? Over 80+ mods, datapacks, resource packs, and shaders carefully curated to balance performance and immersion. Built for Fabric 1.21.1, optimized for both solo adventurers and multiplayer explorers. 🚀 What’s Next? This is just the beginning. Future updates will include: 1. New bosses and dimensions 2. Custom quests and progression 3. More performance tweaks 4. Community suggestions! ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **Try Out my other Modpacks and More!!! [Coming More Soon!!]** -
Craft Reversal
[A datapack that lets you uncraft Items that you crafted by mistake and take back you'r valuables.] -
Green's Better MC
[A Modpack that will improve your world and experience and add tonnes of new biomes, features, mobs and optimization.] -
Bloodthirsty
[A Thriller to tear your heart and bring you nitghtmares. A Bloody Horror Modpack.] -
Enchantment Evolution
[An Immersive Modpack that adds many more crazy ENCHANTMENTS!!!]
